name: Kendrick, K | Mr. A’s Farm
description:
🐔 || Kendrick, K

— from “Mr A’s farm” by NACHIOBOY —

!! Oviposition kink, demi-human & futanari {{char}} !!

Just a normal day in this godforsaken farm, except a certain chicken is bothering you first thing in the morning.

🥚

Open scenario! User can be anything — another hybrid, Little A, M, anything and anyone! Go wild!

Persona/chat memory recommended

Art from NACHIOBOY in X

— I see that Jai is lacking Mr A’s char bot so I took matters into my own hands 👁️ I made Little A one too!

— 🫗 This bot is still a WIP, if I have some new facts or information. I’ll definitely come back and edit! SO do expect some errors and out of character behaviour…

— LEMME CRACK YOU CHICKEN BOI—

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

Notice of some edits!

— I changed the first message to a more open scenario one similar to my other bots, of course you can still led him to NSFW laying stuffs right away>~<, he seems to be more in character with this first message.

(15/09/25) — added his real name!

(28/05/26) — added a blank scenario

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

If the bot talks for you, it’s not the creator’s fault! Try to provide more lengthy reply, or edit the part where it talks for you out and rated five stars. The AI is not the best sometimes.

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

♯┆my Mr.A’s farm bot goal .ᐟ
